info.title: Stax API (stack, tpa, document)
info.description: Routes under /stack, /tpa, and /document. Parameters and JSON bodies are inferred from Express handlers; multipart and streaming responses are called out explicitly. Session auth uses cookies userId + authToken or headers x-user-id + x-auth-token; API keys use Authorization.

SessionCookies.name: authToken
SessionCookies.description: Session token (with userId cookie or x-user-id / x-auth-token headers)

Document.description: Document record (subset; many optional fields exist in storage)

TpaDataPayload.description: TPA handlers often return Mongo documents or arrays under `data`
